hero.subtitle: Ascend Academy's next-generation platform. AI-powered tutoring, real-time analytics, and immersive course experiences — all from your command center.

preview.tutorQuestion: "How do backpropagation gradients flow through a neural network?"

features.subtitle: Six powerful systems working in harmony to deliver the most advanced learning experience in the galaxy.

aiTutor.title: AI Tutor
aiTutor.description: Your personal AI companion that adapts to your learning style, answers questions in real-time, and guides you through complex topics.

liveAnalytics.title: Live Analytics
liveAnalytics.description: Mission-control dashboards track your progress with precision. See your XP, streaks, and skill mastery in real-time.

adaptiveQuizzes.title: Adaptive Quizzes
adaptiveQuizzes.description: Smart assessments that evolve with your knowledge. Wrong answers become learning opportunities, not setbacks.

professorCommand.title: Professor Command
professorCommand.description: Instructors get a full mission control suite: upload lectures, track class performance, and deploy AI-powered insights.

secureVault.title: Secure Vault
secureVault.description: Your learning data is encrypted and protected. Enterprise-grade security with privacy-first architecture.

universalAccess.title: Universal Access
universalAccess.description: Learn anywhere, on any device. Sync progress across platforms with offline capability for deep-space learning.

step1.title: Launch Your Profile
step1.description: Create your astronaut profile. Set your learning goals, choose your mission path, and calibrate your AI tutor.

step2.title: Engage Courses
step2.description: Enter immersive lecture environments. Navigate slides, interact with content, and let the AI guide your journey.

step3.title: AI-Powered Mastery
step3.description: Ask questions in real-time. Get personalized explanations, practice with adaptive quizzes, and level up your skills.

step4.title: Track & Celebrate
step4.description: Watch your progress in the command center. Earn XP, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and reach new levels.

professors.subtitle: Deploy courses, monitor student progress in real-time, and leverage AI analytics to optimize learning outcomes. Your classroom, reimagined as a command center.
professors.bullet1: Upload lectures with intelligent slide parsing

cta.subtitle: Join 50,000+ learners already on their mission. Your AI tutor is standing by, your dashboard is calibrated, and the stars are waiting.

footer.tagline: The next-generation learning platform. AI-powered, data-driven, and built for the future of education.
